title: Room Full of Cheese
description:
This room is full of [b][jitter]cheese!!![/jitter][/b]

You look around to see if there are any traps and above you is... more [b]cheese[/b]. The candles in this room appear to be made of [b]cheese[/b]. The furniture is also [b]cheese[/b].
Suddenly, the door behind you slams shut.

It is made of [b]cheese[/b].

options.title: Gorge
options.description: Choose [blue]2[/blue] of [blue]8[/blue] random [gold]Common[/gold] cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Search
options.description: Lose [red]14[/red] HP. Obtain the [gold]Chosen Cheese[/gold] relic.

notes: The Gorge option presents 8 random common cards from your character's card pool and allows you to choose 2 to add to your deck. The Search option deals [red]14[/red] unblockable, unpowered damage and grants the [gold]Chosen Cheese[/gold] relic. If you die from the damage dealt by the Search option, the death message will read: [gold]{character} ate too much in the Room Full of Cheese.[/gold]
